candidates.expected_size_estimation_basis: curl's Linux CI matrix runs ~47 jobs, ~9 min; expect a large aggregate log

license.redistribution_basis: Public GitHub Actions run on a public repository, visible to any visitor by platform design; source license MIT (COPYING).

source_identity.acquisition_barrier_evidence: Two independent, genuinely credential-free real-CI probes (no Authorization header; GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_AUTH_TOKEN/GITHUB_ENTERPRISE_TOKEN unset; unauthenticated rate-limit tier x-ratelimit-limit: 60 confirmed) both failed to retrieve real log bytes: (1) REST .../actions/jobs/{job_id}/logs returned HTTP 403 'Must have admin rights to Repository.' for all 3 jobs, including a job independently verified elsewhere to contain retrievable log bytes through an authenticated path (workflow run 29395614569); (2) the public HTML commit-checks log-viewer path github.com/{owner}/{repo}/commit/{sha}/checks/{job_id}/logs returned HTTP 404 (GitHub's standard not-found page, confirmed anonymous via Set-Cookie: logged_in=no) for both tested jobs (workflow run 29398585305). See decision-records/native-upstream-ci-log-github-anonymous-access.json for full evidence.
source_identity.job_selection_rule: max(job.completed_at - job.started_at), tie-break lowest numeric job id

candidates.expected_size_estimation_basis: 19 system/app log files, 6.0 GB total per Zenodo API metadata; Proxifier.tar.gz (172346 bytes) selected as the one exact frozen archive member

license.redistribution_basis: Zenodo record license.id=cc-by-4.0 (versioned, immutable DOI record).

personal_data_review.sanitization_notes: Real production/lab system logs; not sanitized per publisher README, but content is operational events, not user PII.

source_identity.selection_rule: smallest file by publisher-declared byte size among the record's 19 files (verified via Zenodo API); archive_member is the archive's sole member (verified by direct extraction listing)

candidates.expected_size_estimation_basis: 90 days of host/network logs, per-day .bz2 files, no consolidated size published

license.redistribution_basis: Explicit public-domain waiver stated on the publisher page (CC0-equivalent) — redistribution basis is clear, but the source itself is not technically acquirable without an interactive access grant (see acquisition_barrier_evidence).

personal_data_review.sanitization_notes: Publisher explicitly deidentified host/user/domain names before release.

publisher.identity: Los Alamos National Laboratory CSR group

source_identity.acquisition_barrier_evidence: Fetched https://csr.lanl.gov/data/2017/ directly and inspected the page markup: the actual per-day download links are rendered as with an empty populated only after an interactive 'please provide your email address' request flow — there is no static, reproducible, unauthenticated download URL a trusted credential-free CI job can fetch.

source_identity.selection_rule: sole non-pcap file in the record; independently downloaded and MD5-verified against the Zenodo API's own published checksum during N2-C closure research
